name: python3-libvslvm
title: python3-libvslvm
summary: Linux LVM volume system format access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
Linux LVM volume system format access library -- Python 3 bindings
libvslvm is a library to access the Linux Logical Volume Manager
(LVM) volume system format.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libvslvm.
